special_mechanics.name: Time Gates
special_mechanics.description: Portals that allow time travel between past, present, and future. Transport player to same location in different time period and environment.

special_mechanics.name: Overhead Movement
special_mechanics.description: Top-down perspective with free movement between screens on overhead map. Player can traverse diverse environments including forests, deserts, towns, underwater areas, dungeons, and palace labyrinths.

special_mechanics.name: Real-time Combat
special_mechanics.description: Real-time battles with enemies encountered on overhead map using sword (close-range), rod (projectiles), and magic spells.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - No physics parameters documented in available sources. Sources contain game design overview, regional differences, and debug features but no movement mechanics, gravity, jump physics, or sub-pixel data.
sources_used: tcrf - The Cutting Room Floor (debug features, regional differences)
wikipedia - The Magic of Scheherazade (gameplay overview, character classes, mechanics description)
